mapper.select:
SELECT nr.recipient_id, nr.notification_type, cc.cd_code_nm AS notification_type_nm, nr.recipient_nm, nr.phone_no, nr.user_id, nr.site_cd, si.site_name, nr.use_yn, nr.sort_ord, nr.remark, nr.reg_id, DATE_FORMAT(nr.reg_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS reg_dt, nr.upd_id, DATE_FORMAT(nr.upd_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS upd_dt FROM notification_recipient nr LEFT JOIN cd_common cc ON cc.cd_div = 'NOTI_TYPE' AND cc.cd_code = nr.notification_type AND cc.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN site_info si ON si.site_cd = nr.site_cd AND si.del_yn = 'N' WHERE 1 = 1
ORDER BY nr.sort_ord ASC, nr.recipient_id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification_recipient nr LEFT JOIN site_info si ON si.site_cd = nr.site_cd AND si.del_yn = 'N' WHERE 1 = 1

sql.if: AND ( nr.recipient_nm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR nr.phone_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR nr.user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select: SELECT recipient_id, notification_type, recipient_nm, phone_no, user_id, site_cd, use_yn, sort_ord, remark, reg_id, DATE_FORMAT(reg_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS reg_dt, upd_id, DATE_FORMAT(upd_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS upd_dt FROM notification_recipient WHERE recipient_id = #{recipientId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification_recipient ( notification_type, recipient_nm, phone_no, user_id, site_cd, use_yn, sort_ord, remark, reg_id, reg_dt ) VALUES ( #{notificationType}, #{recipientNm}, #{phoneNo}, #{userId}, #{siteCd}, #{useYn}, #{sortOrd}, #{remark}, #{regId}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE notification_recipient SET notification_type = #{notificationType}, recipient_nm = #{recipientNm}, phone_no = #{phoneNo}, user_id = #{userId}, site_cd = #{siteCd}, use_yn = #{useYn}, sort_ord = #{sortOrd}, remark = #{remark}, upd_id = #{updId}, upd_dt = NOW() WHERE recipient_id = #{recipientId}
UPDATE notification_recipient SET use_yn = 'N', upd_id = #{updId}, upd_dt = NOW() WHERE recipient_id = #{recipientId}
